The [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] '''''Annihilator''''', was stationed on the borders of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], near the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]], with the ''[[Ruthless]]'' around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Newen Streeg]] of the Periphery had the option of calling on the ''Annihilator'' when necessary.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
There are two Imperial warships called ''Annihilator'' at roughly the same time. The [[Annihilator (Executor-class)/Legends|second]] was an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]].
